products.name: RadCheck
products.description: Fast, read-only system scan that surfaces early reliability risks and instability signals before problems escalate.

products.name: Sentinel
products.description: Continuous protection layer that detects runtime anomalies and warns operators before reliability issues become incidents.

products.name: Operator Bundle - Field Reliability Kit
products.description: Includes: Sentinel + Watchdog + SphinxGate + DriftGuard + Transmission. Extended telemetry history, Advanced Reliability Scoreboard, Priority rule updates

products.name: FindMyAgent
products.description: Situational awareness for your agents - see presence, recent activity, and attention flags so you know what your system is doing at a glance.

products.name: SphinxGate
products.description: Policy enforcement and model governance that keeps agent routing disciplined and within defined operational guardrails.

products.name: DriftGuard
products.description: Advanced behavioral drift detection that highlights when agent behavior begins to diverge from expected patterns.

products.name: Transmission
products.description: Multi-model routing intelligence that manages provider selection and routing consistency for agent workloads.

products.name: WatchDog
products.description: Runtime heartbeat and stall detection that forms the reliability foundation for OpenClaw environments.

products.name: Lazarus
products.description: Backup readiness and restore verification that ensures your system can recover cleanly when failures occur.

products.name: Agent911
products.description: Unified operator cockpit for reliability visibility and guided triage across your OpenClaw agent environment.
